rows.description: Boxer: Kidding: S. Newington x Merst.

rows.description: Plate excise due Lady Day Last
rows.notes: Amounts '5 | 15 | 0' clearly visible. Description 'Plate excise due Lady Day Last' reads well and is consistent with terminology on such pages.
Final total at bottom right reads '100 | 2 | 11½'. The halfpenny symbol is visible; alignment with ruling lines is clear and values are within valid ranges.
